LAW AND MOTION 302, PREVIOUSLY SUBMITTED ON OCTOBER 12, 2012, DEFENDANT HEALD COLLEGE, LLC'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY CASE IS VACATED AND RESET FOR HEARING ON JANUARY 29, 2013. JUDGE KATHERINE FEINSTEIN
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR DEFENDANT HEALD COLLEGE, LLC'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY CASE HEARING SET FOR JAN-29-2013 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT HEALD COLLEGE, LLC'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY CASE WAS PREVIOUSLY HEARD BY JUDGE KAHN WHO TOOK IT UNDER SUBMISSION. THAT RULING WAS VACATED BECAUSE HE WAS UNAVAILABLE. JUDGE KAHN IS NOW AVAILABLE AND THE MATTER IS RE-SUBMITTED WITHOUT FURTHER ARGUMENT. NO APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY AND A RULING WILL BE ISSUED FORTHWITH. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

Defendant Heald College, Llc'S Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Case
Off Calendar Dec-18-2012 Advanced From Jan-29-13 To Jan-28-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

Defendant Heald College, Llc'S Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Case
Off Calendar Jan-28-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT HEALD COLLEGE, LLC's Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Case was previously heard by Judge Kahn who took it under submission. That ruling was vacated because he was unavailable. Judge Kahn is now available and the matter is re-submitted without further argument. No appearances are necessary and a ruling will be issued forthwith. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-12-2012 Continued To Mar-13-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2012 Continued To Dec-26-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Petition And Petition Of Deft Heald College Llc To Compel Arbitration And Stay Case; Pos
Off Calendar Nov-29-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: FRANK SARRO, ESQ., 415.439.8877, FOR PLAINTIFF VERONICA BARBA.
JEFFREY BROWN, ESQ., PAYNE & FEARS, 949.797.1231, FOR DEFENDANT HEALD COLLEGE.

RULING: MATTER ARGUED. AT CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT ORDERS: BEFORE 5PM ON OCTOBER 19, 2012 COUNSEL MAY SUBMIT AUTHORITY (NOT FURTHER ARGUMENT) VIA EMAIL. THE COURT WILL TAKE DEFENDANT HEALD COLLEGE, LLC'S Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Case UNDER SUBMISSION ON OCTOBER 19, 2012. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.
